zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Byron III於1371年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾克雷頓 煙雨 福利可利時，他的父親Sir Richard Byron de Clayton47歲，母親Joan de Colwick47歲。他和Margery Booth至少有1個女兒。他去世於1465年4月在英國英格蘭越可爾享年94歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾曼徹斯特曼徹斯特 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Byron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Byram (Yorkshire), named with Old English bȳrum ‘at the cattle sheds’, dative plural of bȳre ‘byre’. This name has occasionally been adopted as a Jewish surname, presumably as an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish name.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Byron III was born in 1371, in Clayton with Frickley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Byron de Clayton, was 47 and his mother, Joan de Colwick, was 47. He had at least 1 daughter with Margery Booth. He died in April 1465, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 94, and was buried in Manchester Cathedral, Manchester, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Byron III est né en 1371, à Clayton with Frickley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Byron de Clayton, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Joan de Colwick, avait 47 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Margery Booth. Il est décédé en avril 1465, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 94 ans, et a été enterré à Manchester Cathedral, Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Byron III 1371 in Clayton with Frickley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Byron de Clayton 47 und seine Mutter Joan de Colwick 47. Er hatte mit Margery Booth mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb im April 1465 im Alter von 94 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Manchester Cathedral, Manchester, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Byron III è nato il nel 1371 nel Clayton with Frickley, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Richard Byron de Clayton, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Colwick, aveva 47 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Margery Booth. Morì nel aprile 1465, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 94 anni, e fu sepolto a Manchester Cathedral, Manchester, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Byron IIIが1371年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレイトン ウィス フリックリーで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Byron de Claytonは47歳，母Joan de Colwickは47歳であった。彼はMargery Boothとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1465年4月にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで94歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターマンチェスター カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.Manchester Cathedral, Manchester, Lancas: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 먼체스터 먼체스터 캐테드럴
ko.Ashton under Lyne, Lancashire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 애슈턴 운더 리니
ko.lifeSummary: John de Byron III(이)가 1371년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레이턴 위스 프릭리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Byron de Clayton(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Colwick(은)는 47세였다. 그는 Margery Booth(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1465년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 94세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 먼체스터 먼체스터 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Byron III nasceu em 1371, em Clayton with Frickley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Byron de Clayton, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Colwick, tinha 47 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Margery Booth. Ele faleceu em abril de 1465, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 94 anos, e foi sepultado em Manchester Cathedral, Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Byron III родился в 1371 г. в местности клеитон вит фриккли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Byron de Clayton было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Colwick, 47. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Margery Booth. Он умер апрель 1465 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 94 лет и был похоронен в местности манчестир кэтедраль, манчестир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Margery Booth.
